guardrails: W1.5.224 converts W1.5.223 needs_followup_not_accepted decisions into an explicit remaining blocker plan only.
No FR, A4 item, A8 item, EXIT-P1-1, or EXIT-P1-10 is accepted, implemented, or marked ready by this slice.

W1.5.224 does not implement runtime/Desktop production behavior, accepted spec changes, ADR changes, schema changes, generated schema changes, dependency changes, packaging, updater work, or baseline docx changes.
Dependency-gated work remains blocked until the separate dependency gates are approved and implemented.
FR-015 restore, continue execution, and snapshot ledger projection remain blocked while ADR-0012 is Proposed.
M1.6 demo workflow, CW-Bench, and completed-run replay evidence stay deferred to M1.6 or later explicit phase-level slices.

Evidence remains metadata-only and does not retain prompt text, model output, uploaded-file bytes, instruction text, HITL prompt content, custom decision values, response bodies, artifact bodies, file content, user staged file content, secure paths, cache paths, output directory values, full destination paths, or credential values.
